why_this_action.summary: Refresh the stale primary-repo-flat contact packet after the executor truth fix so active review-window targets stay excluded.
supporting_reasons: primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json now exposes AI Saying as a packet-executable feedback-form target.
The previous packet refresh still included TIMEWELL even though that target is already covered by an active manual review window.
A truthful Codeberg-first packet for the changed target set is a better asset than another empty-board guard note.

result.summary: Converted the fresh primary-repo-flat publisher discovery into one canonical Codeberg-first execution packet so the loop can use a genuinely different contact lane during the current measurement window.
